comments: Tommy signs off by saying he met the guys from Crys at Bangor University last year and that "it's a real pleasure to play music from our isles... in whatever language it's recorded."

Tommy mentions that an old drinking buddy of his who now lives in Bergen, Norway called Neil rang him in the studio after the first part of the Fleetwood Mac session and reminded him that they used to drink together in 1967 when TV first broadcast it! Tommy says that next time Neil is over in London "the drinks are on me!"

sessions.artist: Crys - first broadcast of session recorded 7th January 1983 (no commercial release)
sessions.details: Liam Forde (Vocals, Rhythm Guitar), Scott Forde (Bass), Nicky Samuel (Drums), Alun Morgan (Lead Guitar)
first played on Top Gear. Available on Peter Green's Fleetwood Mac - Live At The BBC (1995, 2xCD, Fleetwood Records)

track_listing.track: 'Blinded By A Lie' (LP - Making Contact) Chrysalis
'Through A Somber Galaxy' (LP - Time To Turn) Harvest
'Doomed By The Living Dead' (12" - Mercyful Fate) Rave-On
'Since You've Been Gone' (LP - Done To Earth) Polydor
'If You Really Want' (7" single-Round Tower) Chestnut
'No Way' (LP - Out Of The Night) Aegean
'A Little Thing Called Love' (LP - Trans) Geffen
